name: Samudrika Naval Marine Museum
description: A comprehensive showcase of the Andaman archipelago's marine biodiversity, tribal heritage, and geological history, maintained by the Indian Navy.
history: Established by the Indian Navy to educate visitors about the islands' unique marine ecosystem, tribal cultures, and natural history.
famousFor: Marine life exhibits, coral displays, and tribal artifacts
timings: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM, 2:00 PM – 5:00 PM (Closed on Mondays)
